title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 105.494 - Governor — appointment to certain boards or commissions prohibited
text:
105.494.  Governor — appointment to certain boards or commissions prohibited. — No governor shall be appointed by any board or commission of state government to any administrative position which such board or commission has the authority to fill, during that governor's term of office, within two years of his leaving his elective office, and as long as a majority of the members serving on such board or commission were appointed by that governor.
(L. 1990 H.B. 1650 & 1565 § 7) 
Effective 1-01-91
